sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, sample_text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, sample_text) VALUES (1, 'Hello, world!');
SELECT positionCaseInsensitive(sample_text, 'hello') AS pos FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET sample_text = 'Goodbye, world!' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT positionCaseInsensitive(sample_text, 'GOODBYE') AS pos FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
